instruction: DeepStake3D active project. Restart using temporary CODEX_HOME after app-server access fix. Target only REAL GAME FOUNDATION: ModularConstructionPrototype V1. Inspect existing ModularConstructionPrototype scene/scripts/prefabs/tests and current git diff. Do not touch WorldPrototype3D, screenshots, Discord, UPM, approval tooling, Meshy prop placement, inventory, crafting, combat, NPC systems, or process/PID cleanup. If V1 foundation is already complete, do not edit files; report commit-ready files and files to exclude. V1 foundation requires isolated ModularConstructionPrototype scene or equivalent, 1 Unity unit = 1 meter, believable character/building scale, floor/wall/door/window/fence/gate modular pieces, grid snapping, 90-degree rotation snap, basic place/remove, and tile/chunk data for future large maps. If incomplete, make only the smallest foundation fix. Output changed files, validation command/result, and commit recommendation.
